nl_query: Show the ltree path and level for every question in Section A of the Data Structures paper.
failed_sql: SELECT q.id, q.code, q.path, q.level FROM question q JOIN question_section qs ON q.section_id = qs.id WHERE qs.qp_id = (SELECT id FROM question_paper WHERE title = 'Data Structures paper') AND qs.name = 'Section A'
